productDisplayName: Puma Women Faas 300 Blue & Pink Sports Shoes
description: The Faas 300 from puma is a lightweight everyday trainer. Inspired by old school running trainers, these shoes are not only perfect for Sports, but also look great when teamed with casual wear. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic suede overlays for structure and breathability Formstripe on both sides Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Lace-ups for snug Fit Midsole Full-length lateral groove in the midsole to reinforce stability throughout the gait cycle OrthoLite sockliner for superior comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial function Outsole EverRide technology to reduce weight and improve forefoot cushioning EverTrack used in the outsole for greater durability in high-wear areas Rocker shape of outsole allows for natural stride with an effortless toe-off Flex grooves built across the waffle patterned outsole to enhance flexibility shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
